top_findings.summary: The skill description for a Gainsight customer success platform integration requests an excessive set of general-purpose tools (Read, Write, Glob, Grep, Bash, WebFetch). Access to tools like `Bash` (arbitrary command execution), `Write` (write to any file), and `Glob`/`Grep` (search entire filesystem) is unnecessary for the stated purpose of interacting with a specific API to retrieve health scores and success plans. This represents significant permission overreach beyond what is required for API integration tasks.
top_findings.impact: OVERREACH: Permission Overreach & Data Over-collection - The skill description for a Gainsight customer success platform integration requests an excessive set of general-purpose tools (Read, Write, Glob, Grep, Bash, WebFetch). Access to tools like `Bash` (arbitrary command execution), `Write` (write to any file), and `Glob`/`Grep` (search entire filesystem) is unnecessary for the stated purpose of interacting with a specific API to retrieve health scores and success plans. This represents significant permission overreach beyond what is required for API integration tasks.
